output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?dynasty ?dynastyLabel(YEAR(MAX(?endTime)) - YEAR(MIN(?startTime)) AS ?durationYears) WHERE {
  ?emperor wdt:P177 ?dynasty .
  ?emperor p:P39 ?positionStatement .
  ?positionStatement ps:P39 wd:Q1169656 ; pq:P1365 ?startTime ; pq:P1366 ?endTime .
  ?dynasty wdt:P31 wd:Q164950 ; rdfs:label ?dynastyLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?dynastyLabel) = "en")
}
GROUP BY ?dynasty ?dynastyLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?durationYears)

           rdfs:label ?dynastyLabel.
  FILTER(LANG(?dynastyLabel) = "en")
}
GROUP BY ?dynasty ?dynastyLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?durationYears)
